name: snackbyte-release-flow-action
description: Dev harness for the manifest-driven release-flow GitHub Action. NOT an npm package — the distribution unit is action.yml (Constitution VI). This package.json exists only to run the bash test suite.

scripts.test:release: bash scripts/derive-version.test.sh && bash scripts/resolve-env.test.sh && bash scripts/add-env.test.sh && bash scripts/action.test.sh
